story: Hershey asked me to protect his hoomans and watch for the middle cub, Randy, who skateboards at night. I waited in the dark until Randy and a friend rolled by, then stepped into the streetlight with my big panting “smile.” “Aww, look at that big dog! He’s following us! C’mere, boy!” They petted me.  I had not been claimed. I didn’t live in a hooman house—yet.
implausible_knowledge: I had not been claimed. I didn’t live in a hooman house—yet.
question: Later that night, as Randy decides what to do with the big dog, what will he do?
answer_with_knowledge: Bring the dog as their new pet.
